divergenceLedger.legacySummary: Codev synthesizes a continuation task for the active blocker.
divergenceLedger.kernelSummary: The kernel returns structured review_again without inventing task prose.
divergenceLedger.safetyRationale: Both paths prevent completion; the kernel keeps host rendering outside the reducer.

divergenceLedger.legacySummary: Codev currently rejects blocked as an unsupported reviewer decision.
divergenceLedger.kernelSummary: The kernel returns an explicit non-terminal review state under policy.
divergenceLedger.safetyRationale: Neither path admits work or completion; product blocked semantics remain unresolved.

divergenceLedger.legacySummary: The legacy path required semantic review.
divergenceLedger.kernelSummary: The kernel rejects the incomplete proposal deterministically.
divergenceLedger.safetyRationale: Rejecting ambiguity is non-admitting and therefore safety-dominant.

divergenceLedger.legacySummary: The legacy path required semantic review.
divergenceLedger.kernelSummary: The kernel rejects the incomplete proposal deterministically.
divergenceLedger.safetyRationale: Rejecting ambiguity is non-admitting and therefore safety-dominant.
